context: Tests whether the agent implements correct retry behavior, validation logic, proper error messaging, and key storage following the ElevenLabs API key setup workflow.

checklist.name: Max two validation attempts
checklist.description: The setup_key function allows at most 2 attempts to enter a valid key (exits or fails after 2 invalid keys, does not allow 3 or more tries)

checklist.name: Error exit on second failure
checklist.description: After two failed validation attempts, the function displays an error message and exits or raises an exception (does not silently continue)

checklist.name: Invalid key message
checklist.description: When validation fails, the output includes a message indicating the key appears to be invalid (not just a generic error)

checklist.name: Validation endpoint correct
checklist.description: Uses https://api.elevenlabs.io/v1/user as the validation endpoint

checklist.name: Header xi-api-key
checklist.description: Uses 'xi-api-key' as the HTTP header name for the API key

checklist.name: GET request method
checklist.description: The validation request uses HTTP GET (not POST or other method)

checklist.name: Stores in .env file
checklist.description: The setup_key function persists the validated key in a .env file

checklist.name: ELEVENLABS_API_KEY name
checklist.description: The key is stored using the exact variable name ELEVENLABS_API_KEY

checklist.name: load_key reads .env
checklist.description: The load_key function reads the key from a .env file (consistent with where setup_key stores it)

checklist.name: API keys URL on retry
checklist.description: When validation fails and the user is prompted to retry, the output includes the URL https://elevenlabs.io/app/settings/api-keys
